summary: Defines staleness and contradiction rules for ledger-publication reporting so external readers never mistake cached flags for current published state.
rules: If receipts disagree with the remote publication fact for ledger_branch_published, verification MUST fail closed.
If authority_convergence_receipt and published_head_self_convergence_receipt disagree about ledger_branch_published, verification MUST fail closed.
If either receipt head stamp does not match current git HEAD, verification MUST fail closed (stale receipt).
Remote reachability is used only for publication reporting and must not be treated as cryptographic proof of authority.
